repo_description: Right-click front-end for personal scripts. Macos Util.
ollama_description: This application installs custom right-click actions into macOS Services without requiring code signing or app extensions. It allows users to define and manage file operations via a configuration file and a menu bar interface.

repo_description: Educational visualization of the React ecosystem
ollama_description: This tool provides a visual representation of a frontend technology stack. It allows developers to preview and analyze their project configuration through an intuitive interface.

repo_description: Local macOS app that anonymizes sensitive documents while keeping the narrative intact. Replaces names, dates, emails and other PII with consistent pseudonyms using a deterministic seeding layer on top of Microsoft Presidio, so anonymized text stays coherent for LLM analysis or human review.  Topics
ollama_description: This tool removes sensitive information from various file types while maintaining the integrity and flow of the remaining text. It supports processing images, documents, and PDFs entirely on the local machine to ensure data privacy.

This collection provides shell utilities, aliases, and background processes designed to enhance terminal workflows and system configuration. It includes scripts for managing dependencies, setting up global ignore rules, and optimizing macOS defaults for improved productivity.

repo_description: Chrome extension for per-tab audio control (speed, reverb, bass..) focused on YouTube,         with optional Flask SSE backend for LAN-wide remote triggering from any device. Free & local
ollama_description: This tool provides real-time audio manipulation capabilities including playback speed adjustment, reverb effects, and volume control. It supports various audio presets and allows for remote management of playback actions across browser tabs.

repo_description: macOS menu-bar app that strips tracking parameters (utm_*, fbclid, etc.) from any         copied URL. Uses merged rules from uBlock Origin and ClearURLs. Fully local and private.
ollama_description: This software monitors the system clipboard to automatically strip tracking parameters from copied URLs. It operates silently in the background to enhance user privacy without requiring manual intervention.

repo_description: My first digital art with js canvas. Includes unfinished projects
ollama_description: This project demonstrates programming concepts using the Canvas API to create offline-capable simulations and visualizations. It focuses on minimal dependencies and reusable functionality for rendering 3D noise and procedural graphics.

repo_description: Chrome DevTools sidebar with fuzzy-search and live edit CSS vars with better workflow than native browser tooling
ollama_description: This tool provides a sidebar interface for inspecting and modifying CSS variables within a browser's developer tools. It supports searching by name or value and allows exporting the current variable set as JSON.

repo_description: WebGL fluid simulation for React — text & image effects
ollama_description: This library provides WebGL-based fluid simulations for creating interactive visual effects on text and images within React applications. It utilizes Navier-Stokes equations to generate dynamic distortions, refractions, and color overlays for user interfaces.

repo_description: Keeps your mac awake while Claude is running or you simply want your screen to remain active while giving a presentation
ollama_description: This tool manages the power state of a macOS system to prevent sleep during long-running tasks. It automatically handles cleanup on exit or crash and includes guards for battery levels and network connectivity.

repo_description: Lightweight Markdown knowledge base bundled with Tauri, Bun for faster ideation compatible with Obsidian
ollama_description: This application provides a streamlined desktop environment for assessing and organizing concepts using plain text files. It allows users to edit content in various editors while maintaining a consistent HTML preview and supports integration with note-taking platforms.

repo_description: research into using nature as a guide for aligned intelligence infrastructure
ollama_description: This project explores the integration of emotional needs into artificial intelligence systems to achieve genuine alignment with human values. It argues that emotions serve as essential internal compasses rather than flaws, proposing a new architectural approach where affect and intelligence are combined to prevent ethical drift.
This tool facilitates the creation of invoices to assist users with billing needs. It serves as a cost-effective alternative to paid software solutions.

repo_description: Homebrew formulas for Mopidy and Mopidy extensions
ollama_description: This tool provides a temporary workaround for installing a media server on macOS systems using Homebrew. It resolves compatibility issues between legacy packaging requirements and newer Python versions by adjusting system paths and dependencies.

This system converts live microphone audio input into formatted Markdown text using a multi-process architecture. It supports real-time transcription, dynamic formatting based on voice commands, and optional AI-based polishing of the generated content.

repo_description: AI agent that applies to jobs for you. Any site. Any form.
ollama_description: This tool automates the job application process by discovering roles across multiple platforms, scoring them against a user profile, and customizing resumes and cover letters. It then autonomously navigates application forms to submit documents and answers questions without manual intervention.
This tool allows users to generate and preview animated GIFs directly in a local browser environment. It provides a simple interface for creating visual media without requiring complex setup.

repo_description: remake of sha256 from shell outputs as exercise
ollama_description: This project provides a Python implementation for generating SHA256 hashes. It is designed to verify data integrity and ensure security through cryptographic checksums.
